info.name: Zoom account/
info.description:
Needs description.

Contact Support:
 Name: Zoom Developers
 Email: developer@zoom.us

urlencoded.description: Sold To Contact’s country. For this parameter value please refer to the id value in country list JSON file
Sold To Contact’s state. If country value is "US" or "CA", for this parameter value please refer to the id value in state list JSON file

request.description: Update Billing Information for a sub account of the master account on Zoom.

urlencoded.description: Sold To Contact’s country. For this parameter value please refer to the id value in country list JSON file
Sold To Contact’s state. If country value is "US" or "CA", for this parameter value please refer to the id value in state list JSON file
(Required) A valid email address. It must be unique in Zoom service. If an email address is existed, a "user existing" error message will be return.
Virtual Room Connector, multiple value separated by comma.
Meeting Connector, multiple value separated by comma.
Who will pay for this account? 0 means Sub Account Holders Pays, 1 means Master Account Holder Pays.
Collection Method? 0 means Automatic (billing online), 1 means Manual (send invoice).
The value should be true or false, by default is true.
Only signed-in users can join this meeting.
Only signed-in users with specified domains can join meetings.
Enable Only the host can download cloud recordings.
Enable Only users on my account can access cloud recordings.

request.description:
Create a sub account of the master account on Zoom, return the created sub account id and owner id.

<aside class="notice">Your account must be a master account and have this privilege to create sub account. Zoom only assign this privilege to trusted partner.</aside>

<aside class="notice">User will not receive the confirmation email.</aside>

urlencoded.description: (Required) A valid email address. It must be unique in Zoom service. If an email address is existed, a "user existing" error message will be return.
Virtual Room Connector, multiple value separated by comma.
Meeting Connector, multiple value separated by comma.
Who will pay for this account? 0 means Sub Account Holders Pays, 1 means Master Account Holder Pays.
Collection Method? 0 means Automatic (billing online), 1 means Manual (send invoice).
The value should be true or false, by default is true.
Only signed-in users can join this meeting.
Only signed-in users with specified domains can join meetings.
Enable Only the host can download cloud recordings.
Enable Only users on my account can access cloud recordings.

request.description:
Get a sub account of the master account on Zoom, return the created sub account id and owner id.

<aside class="notice">Your account must be a master account and have this privilege to get sub account. Zoom only assign this privilege to trusted partner.</aside>

<aside class="notice">This API will let the master account owner to get sub account API key pair. This is a private feature and needs to be enabled by zoom support. If you need this function, please open a case with support to enable this API.</aside>
List all the sub account under the master account.

urlencoded.description: (Required) Additional Plan. See [Plans](#plans) for more details

request.description:
Add a plan for a sub account of the master account on Zoom.

<aside class="notice">Only for the sub account which is a paid account and paid by master account.</aside>

<aside class="notice">Only add an Additional plan for a sub account.</aside>

urlencoded.description: (Required) Additional Plan. See [Plans](#plans) for more details

request.description: Get plans information for a sub account of the master account on Zoom.

urlencoded.description: (Required) Sold To Contact’s country. For this parameter value please refer to the id value in country list JSON file
(Required) Base Plan.  See [Plans](#plans) for more details
(Required) Sold To Contact’s state. If country value is "US" or "CA", for this parameter value please refer to the id value in state list JSON file
Additional Zoom Rooms Plan.  See [Plans](#plans) for more details
Additional H.323/SIP Room Connector Plan.  See [Plans](#plans) for more details
Additional Large Meeting Plan.  See [Plans](#plans) for more details
Additional Webinar Plan.  See [Plans](#plans) for more details
Additional Cloud Recording Plan.  See [Plans](#plans) for more details
Additional Audio Conferencing Plan.  See [Plans](#plans) for more details

request.description: Subscribe plans for a sub account of the master account on Zoom.

urlencoded.description: (Required) Sold To Contact’s country. For this parameter value please refer to the id value in country list JSON file
(Required) Base Plan.  See [Plans](#plans) for more details
(Required) Sold To Contact’s state. If country value is "US" or "CA", for this parameter value please refer to the id value in state list JSON file
Additional Zoom Rooms Plan.  See [Plans](#plans) for more details
Additional H.323/SIP Room Connector Plan.  See [Plans](#plans) for more details
Additional Large Meeting Plan.  See [Plans](#plans) for more details
Additional Webinar Plan.  See [Plans](#plans) for more details
Additional Cloud Recording Plan.  See [Plans](#plans) for more details
Additional Audio Conferencing Plan.  See [Plans](#plans) for more details
(Required) A Base Plan or an Additional Plan. See [Plans](#plans) for more details
(Required) Plan Type. 1 means Base Plan, 2 means Additional Plan.

request.description:
Update a plan for a sub account of the master account on Zoom.

<aside class="notice">Only for the sub account which is a paid account and paid by master account.</aside>

<aside class="notice">Could update a base plan or an additional plan.</aside>

urlencoded.description: (Required) A Base Plan or an Additional Plan. See [Plans](#plans) for more details
(Required) Plan Type. 1 means Base Plan, 2 means Additional Plan.
Virtual Room Connector, multiple value separated by comma.
Meeting Connector, multiple value separated by comma.
Who will pay for this account? 0 means Sub Account Holders Pays, 1 means Master Account Holder Pays.
Collection Method? 0 means Automatic (billing online), 1 means Manual (send invoice).
The value should be true or false, by default is true.
The value should be true or false. If it is true, the user under this account will follow MA call out type.
Only signed-in users can join this meeting.
Only signed-in users with specified domains can join meetings.
Enable Only the host can download cloud recordings.
Enable Only users on my account can access cloud recordings.

request.description: Update a sub account of the master account on Zoom, return the updated sub account id.

urlencoded.description: Virtual Room Connector, multiple value separated by comma.
Meeting Connector, multiple value separated by comma.
Who will pay for this account? 0 means Sub Account Holders Pays, 1 means Master Account Holder Pays.
Collection Method? 0 means Automatic (billing online), 1 means Manual (send invoice).
The value should be true or false, by default is true.
The value should be true or false. If it is true, the user under this account will follow MA call out type.
Only signed-in users can join this meeting.
Only signed-in users with specified domains can join meetings.
